Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Death Gambit
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +28% (augmented)
Pack Size: +10% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +42% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +95% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Shattering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters Break Armour equal to 26(25-30)% of Physical Damage dealt
{ Prefix Modifier "Penetrating" (Tier: 1) }
Monster Damage Penetrates 13(12-14)% Elemental Resistances
{ Prefix Modifier "Tough" (Tier: 1) }
22(20-25)% more Monster Life
{ Suffix Modifier "of Fatigue" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 28(30-25)% less Cooldown Recovery Rate
{ Suffix Modifier "of Exposure" (Tier: 1) }
-7(-8--6)% maximum Player Resistances
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Unwavering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 72(70-79)% increased Ailment Threshold
Monsters have 67(60-69)% increased Stun Threshold
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
